universalAbilities.name: Mace Mastery
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Your next 4 auto attacks have +10% chance to Stagger and +10% chance to Daze on hit.

universalAbilities.name: Sunder Armor
universalAbilities.description: Empower your next 2 auto attacks: each hit deals +20% damage and ignores 30% of the enemy's armor.

universalAbilities.name: Weak Strike
universalAbilities.description: Only usable on Dazed, Staggered, or Stunned targets. Instant. Deals 120% bonus damage (+50% crit chance vs Dazed/Staggered; guaranteed critical vs Stunned).

universalAbilities.name: Armor Shatter
universalAbilities.description: A focused blow aimed at weak points in the enemy's armor, reducing it by 8 for this encounter.

universalAbilities.name: Stunblow
universalAbilities.description: A heavy overhead strike with 60% chance to stun the enemy for about 3 seconds. Cannot stun through a block.

universalAbilities.name: Pressure Strike
universalAbilities.description: A rapid strike targeting armor gaps. Reduces enemy armor by 3 for this encounter. Can be used repeatedly to stack reductions.

universalAbilities.name: Bonebreaker
universalAbilities.description: Only usable on Stunned targets. A slow, devastating blow with full armor penetration that cannot be blocked. Guaranteed to stagger the target.

universalAbilities.name: Heavy Strikes
universalAbilities.description: Empower your next 3 auto attacks with +20% damage.

universalAbilities.name: Parry Guard
universalAbilities.description: Brace into your weapon. Gain +50% parry chance for the next 2 incoming attacks.

universalAbilities.name: Riposte
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Only usable after you parry. Strike back for 180% weapon damage with +20% critical chance.

universalAbilities.name: Crushing Blow
universalAbilities.description: A committed two-handed strike. Deals 150% weapon damage with +25% critical chance. If it critically hits, its remaining cooldown is reduced by 50%.

universalAbilities.name: Execute
universalAbilities.description: Only usable when the enemy is below 20% max HP. A guaranteed two-handed finisher for 180% weapon damage.

universalAbilities.name: Berserker Stance
universalAbilities.description: Dormant. Toggle. Costs 15 Rage to activate. While active, deal 30% more damage, take 30% more damage, and cannot block. Deactivating drains all Rage and starts a 3 second cooldown.

universalAbilities.name: Whirlwind
universalAbilities.description: 2 second cast. Costs 50 Rage. Deals 150% weapon damage to all enemies. If it kills any enemy, recover 25 Rage and heal 15% max HP.

universalAbilities.name: Burnout
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Consume all Momentum stacks to fire one rapid hit per stack at 25% weapon damage each. Requires at least 3 Momentum.

universalAbilities.name: En Garde
universalAbilities.description: Instant. For 3 seconds, parry chance is 100% and parries grant 2 Blade Stacks instead of 1.

universalAbilities.name: Release
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Release all stored Grudge as one raw damage strike, then clear Grudge. Requires at least 1 Grudge.

universalAbilities.name: Open Vein
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Apply 2 Bleeding stacks directly to the enemy.

universalAbilities.name: Shadow Veil
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Gain +20% Evasion for the next 3 incoming auto attacks. Each dodged attack while active fires a shadow shot for 50% weapon damage.

universalAbilities.name: Hunter's Mark
universalAbilities.description: Mark the target for 3 seconds. Your auto attacks against the marked target deal +30% damage and gain +10% critical chance.

universalAbilities.name: Bear Trap
universalAbilities.description: Set a trap on the target for 6 seconds. The next time it tries to auto-attack, the attack is stopped and it is stunned for 2 seconds. Bosses are stunned for 1 second.

universalAbilities.name: Stagger Shot
universalAbilities.description: Instant shot for 110% weapon damage with a 20% chance to Stagger the enemy.

universalAbilities.name: Power Shot
universalAbilities.description: A 3 second cast that deals 200% weapon damage and weakens the enemy's armor for your next 2 auto attacks. Critical hits reduce its remaining cooldown by 50%.

universalAbilities.name: Aimed Shot
universalAbilities.description: After landing a critical hit, take aim for 1 second and fire a heavy shot for 150% weapon damage.

universalAbilities.name: Hemorrhaging Shot
universalAbilities.description: Fire a vicious shot for 130% weapon damage and apply Hemorrhage directly.

universalAbilities.name: Rapid Fire
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Your next 3 auto attacks gain +40% attack speed. Critical strikes add 1 auto attack to Rapid Fire.

universalAbilities.name: Serrated Strikes
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Your next 3 auto attacks deal +5% damage and inflict 1 Bleeding stack on the target.

universalAbilities.name: Pummel Strike
universalAbilities.description: A committed hilt strike for 75% weapon damage with a 50% chance to Stun the target for 2 seconds.

universalAbilities.name: Sword Stance
universalAbilities.description: Enter a focused sword stance: your next 3 auto attacks are 25% faster and have +10% chance to cause Bleeding. If the target is Bleeding, those attacks also gain +10% critical chance.

universalAbilities.name: Hemorrhage
universalAbilities.description: Only usable on targets with at least 2 Bleeding stacks. Tears the wound open: replaces Bleeding with Hemorrhage (4% max HP per second for 4 seconds) and deals 10% of the enemy's max HP as true damage.

universalAbilities.name: Rupture
universalAbilities.description: Only usable on targets with Hemorrhage. Strike for 200% weapon damage as true damage and consume the Hemorrhage.

universalAbilities.name: Shield Up
universalAbilities.description: Raise your shield. The next incoming auto attack is fully blocked without spending Block Power, then you slam the enemy for 50% weapon damage.

universalAbilities.name: Guard Instinct
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Only usable after blocking a hit. Recover 50% Block Power and gain +10% Block Chance for the next 3 incoming auto attacks.

universalAbilities.name: FireBall
universalAbilities.description: Launch a compact fire orb that scorches the target.

universalAbilities.name: FireBlast
universalAbilities.description: Unleash a violent blast of fire in front of you.

universalAbilities.name: FireCone
universalAbilities.description: Shape a broad cone of fire that burns through the enemy.

universalAbilities.name: War Cry
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Unleash a sudden battle shout that Dazes the enemy for 2 seconds, disrupting their spellcasting.

universalAbilities.name: Shock and Awe
universalAbilities.description: A thunderous shout that rattles the enemy's footing. Staggers them for 2 attacks, imposing a 35% miss penalty.

universalAbilities.name: Battle Focus
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Sharpen your intent before striking. Your next 3 auto attacks deal +15% damage.

universalAbilities.name: Demoralize
universalAbilities.description: Shatter the enemy's confidence with a crushing display of force. Reduces their damage by 25% for 4 seconds.

universalAbilities.name: Iron Will
universalAbilities.description: Instant. Brace against incoming punishment. Reduces all physical damage taken by 35% for 5 seconds. 30 second cooldown.

universalAbilities.name: Unleash
universalAbilities.description: Command your wolf into a short frenzy for 4 seconds: +50% attack speed and +35% damage dealt, but it takes 30% more damage. Afterward, the wolf cannot attack for 3 seconds.

universalAbilities.name: Mend Companion
universalAbilities.description: Tend your wolf, restoring 30% of its max HP over 3 seconds.

universalAbilities.name: Barbed Trap
universalAbilities.description: Set a barbed trap on the target for 8 seconds. The next time it tries to auto-attack, it gains Bleeding and has its attack speed slowed. Poisoned targets are also Staggered for 1 attack.

universalAbilities.name: Covering Fire
universalAbilities.description: Fire 3 rapid arrows in 1 second for 40% weapon damage each. The enemy's next auto-attack misses.

universalAbilities.name: Headshot
universalAbilities.description: Once per combat. Requires 4 critical hits landed this fight. Cast for 1.5 seconds to deal 280% weapon damage and ignore armor. If it crits, stun for 3 seconds.

universalAbilities.name: Wild Renewal
universalAbilities.description: Channel 4s. Restore 40% max HP to you and 20% max HP to your wolf during the channel. Scales with spell power. Your wolf takes 15% less damage while channeling. If the wolf has fallen, it is revived at 25% HP when the channel completes.

classes.name: Monk
classes.description: A swift martial artist who overwhelms enemies with rapid strikes and inner focus.

abilities.name: Flurry of Fists
abilities.description: Perform 4 rapid strikes in a single burst.

abilities.name: Focused Impact
abilities.description: A focused strike that stuns the enemy for 1 second, preventing any action.

abilities.name: Meditation
abilities.description: Channel inner energy to restore 30% of max HP over 4 seconds.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A powerful warrior who excels at dealing heavy blows and holding the line.

abilities.name: Heavy Blow
abilities.description: Deal 150% normal damage. 10% chance to crit for an additional 1.5x.

abilities.name: Guard Stance
abilities.description: Raise your guard, increasing Block Chance and Block Power regeneration for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Rush at the enemy, stunning them for 1 second.

abilities.name: Brutal Followthrough
abilities.description: Only usable after landing a critical hit. Strike again for 130% damage.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: Instant. Only usable after blocking a hit. Slam the target for 100% weapon damage and stun it for roughly 4 seconds.

abilities.name: War Cry
abilities.description: Harden your stance and raise your counter chance for longer.

classes.name: Archer
classes.description: A precise ranged fighter who relies on speed, positioning, and universal spellcraft.

abilities.name: Quick Shot
abilities.description: Loose a fast arrow for 115% weapon damage.

abilities.name: Focused Shot
abilities.description: Take aim and fire a stronger arrow for 150% weapon damage.

classes.name: Lancer
classes.description: A disciplined polearm fighter who controls distance with direct, heavy thrusts.

abilities.name: Lance Thrust
abilities.description: Drive the lance forward for 135% weapon damage.

abilities.name: Pinning Charge
abilities.description: Rush the enemy and stun them for 1 second.

universalUltimates.name: Bankai Senbonzakura
universalUltimates.description: A cinematic ultimate that freezes combat and overwhelms the enemy with a storm of blades.
